# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We only support the latest version of this library. If you are experiencing a security issue and are not on the latest version, please update to the latest version to see if the issue persists.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest  | Yes       |
| < Latest | No       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in the latest version, please report it as described below.

**Do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Please report them via the **Security** tab on this repository (use **Report a vulnerability**) so we can handle it privately. We're a small team. We'll acknowledge your report and work on a fix. Thank you for helping us improve.
